name: canshare-tnm8-neuroendocrine-gi-colorectal-pn
title: NZ AJCC (8th edition) neuroendocrine gastrointestinal colon and/or rectum pathological N category
description: A pathological regional lymph node stage (pN) of a neuroendocrine gastrointestinal colon and/or rectum tumour before initiation of treatment, using chapter 33 of the AJCC cancer staging manual (8th edition).
